name: Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the temperature specified in your bread machine's manual.
2. Place ingredients in order as indicated by your bread machine's program.
3. Select the Automatic Bread Program.
4. Press START. The bread will be ready in approximately 3 hours.
5. After baking, press STOP/RESET.
6. Remove the bread from the machine and allow it to cool completely before slicing.
